lines.text: ...Excuse me, did you drop this USB drive?

lines.speaker: EECS Boy
lines.text: Oh! Yes! Thank you so much...
Haha, you look panicked. Is something important on it?

lines.speaker: EECS Boy
lines.text: My entire OS assignment... You saved my life.
I'm Mei. See you around, EECS boy.

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.text: Heh. Bold. Maybe if you can impress everyone around me first.

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.text: ...Okay then. Bye.

lines.speaker: Professor Chen
lines.text: So you want to court my student? Prove your worth first.

lines.speaker: Professor Chen
lines.text: Solve my circuit challenges before the timer runs out. Begin!

lines.speaker: Professor Chen
lines.text: ...Not bad. You understand logic. Perhaps you are worthy.

lines.speaker: Professor Chen
lines.text: Take this Heart Fragment. She'll hear about this.

lines.speaker: Professor Chen
lines.text: Pathetic. Come back when your logic is sound.

lines.speaker: NPC Bystander
lines.text: Watch out! Niu Pai is on the loose near the pond!

lines.speaker: EECS Boy
lines.text: I just need to get past to meet Mei's dad...

lines.speaker: EECS Boy
lines.text: Made it! Sorry Niu Pai, no hard feelings.

lines.speaker: EECS Boy
lines.text: You know what, Niu Pai... maybe you're all I need.

lines.speaker: Niu Pai
lines.text: * wags tail *

lines.speaker: Mr. Wang
lines.text: You want to date my daughter? Show me your sincerity.

lines.speaker: Mr. Wang
lines.text: Catch what I throw. Dodge what I don't. Simple.

lines.speaker: Mr. Wang
lines.text: Hmph. You have good reflexes. I'll allow it — for now.

lines.speaker: Mr. Wang
lines.text: You can't even catch sincerity when it's thrown at you. Go home.

slides.title: TRUE LOVE ENDING
slides.body:
You collected all 3 Heart Fragments and proved yourself to everyone.

Mei looks at you with a warm smile...

"I heard about everything you did. The professor, my dad, even Niu Pai likes you now."

"...I like you too, EECS boy."

slides.title: CONGRATULATIONS!
slides.body:
LOVE.EXE — Complete!

Thank you for playing.

slides.title: FRIEND ZONE ENDING
slides.body:
You did well, but something was missing...

Mei smiles warmly.

"You're a really good person. Let's be friends!"

*You smile and nod, hiding your disappointment.*

slides.title: REJECTED ENDING
slides.body:
You didn't manage to impress anyone...

Mei shakes her head apologetically.

"I'm sorry... I don't think this will work out."

*Maybe try harder next time.*

slides.title: NIU PAI ENDING  (Easter Egg!)
slides.body: You fed Niu Pai so many times that you forgot why you came here.

Niu Pai is now your best friend.

*Who needs romance when you have a dog?*

slides.title: EECS OVERLOAD ENDING  (Easter Egg!)
slides.body:
You aced every mini-game with perfect scores.

But you never once said anything romantic.

You graduate with highest honors.

...Still single.

*Achievement Unlocked: 4.0 GPA, 0 Dates.*
